profile.name: Kevin Loving
profile.title: AI Systems Engineer | Multi-Agent Systems Researcher
profile.tagline: Researching how autonomous AI agents can safely reason, act, and interact with human systems.

about.title: about me
paragraphs: I build and study intelligent systems that allow autonomous agents to reason, interact with tools, and operate within complex environments. My technical work focuses on large language models, multi-agent systems, and the infrastructure required to run large-scale agent experiments.

Alongside building these systems, I am interested in the broader social and philosophical questions surrounding AI. My writing and research explore how AI technologies reshape human decision making, institutions, and access to knowledge, including topics such as AI in education, accessibility, and the role of AI-enabled technologies in supporting community autonomy and sovereignty.

My background spans machine learning engineering, enterprise-scale systems, and startup product development. I previously worked on large-scale HR technology systems at Amazon and have founded and built multiple technical projects and startups. More details on my technical experience and projects can be found in my resume, GitHub, and project pages.

items.name: Guildmaster AI
items.description: Building a distributed multi-agent platform where autonomous AI agents interact with environments, tools, and data pipelines to support research into agent planning, reasoning, and autonomous decision making.

items.name: AI Systems Infrastructure
items.description: Designing containerized ML infrastructure for scalable agent orchestration, model inference, and experiment logging using Docker, Kubernetes, and Python services.

groups.label: Social and Ethical Questions
items: ADHD and Neurodiversity in the Workplace

opportunities.title: collaborating
items: If you're interested in collaborating, reach out when you want someone who can help turn rough ideas into working systems, think rigorously about hard problems, and contribute across both technical implementation and written communication. I'm especially interested in collaborations around software projects, research-inspired work, and interdisciplinary ideas that benefit from both engineering depth and curiosity.

contact.title: contact
contact.message: If you're interested in collaborating on AI systems research, autonomous agents, or experimental ML infrastructure, feel free to reach out.
